    Vampire - Class in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters
    Vampire hybrid melee character with life-steal mechanics.
    Vampire() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Creates Vampire with default tuned stats and animation setup.
    Vampire(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Creates Vampire with custom stats.
    vampireWeapon(Group, boolean) - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Applies custom weapon position offsets for vampire animations.
    velocityX - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Horizontal velocity used by acceleration/friction movement model.
    velocityY - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Vertical velocity used by jump/gravity simulation.
